reference_groups.name: A place in the valley of Megiddon Zec 12:11

ai_enrichment.error: error: Schema validation failed for /app/data/processed/topical_references/unified/themes/themes_catalog.json: 'canonical' is a required property

definitions.text: is, according to the ordinary interpretation of (12:11) a place in the valley of Megiddo (a part of the plain of Esdraelon, six miles from Mount Carmel and eleven from Nazareth), where a national lamentation was held for the death of King Josiah. It was named after two Syrian idols.
